name: Scott Colley
abstract: Scott Colley (born November 24, 1963) is an American jazz double bassist and composer. As of 2024, he had been nominated for 4 Grammy Awards, including Best Jazz Instrumental Album for Guided Tour in 2014 and Still Dreaming in 2019.

concerts.label: Karrin Allyson and Luciana Souza, Singers
Fujitsu Jazz Festival: The Magic of Toots - A Celebration of Toots Thielemans
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: A Notables-Exclusive Event: Julian Lage, Guitar

about_quotes.speaker: Jim Hall
about_quotes.evidence: Scott Colley and I played in Buenos Aires just a few years ago... actually, I did a whole CD at the Vanguard with Louis Nash and Scott Colley.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jim Hall — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Gilmore
about_quotes.evidence: Scott Colley is a wonderful bass player... As a matter of fact I believe I’m subbing for Scott on this gig, I don’t know for sure.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Gilmore interviewed by Monk Rowe, Delaware Water Gap, PA, November 8, 1999
